Name: MAP_OBJECT_MOMENTUM_SCALE_PARAM
Description: Defines momentum scaling factors applied to map objects based on size categories and two separate object channels or instances.

Fields.Name: None (Obj 0)
Fields.Description: No momentum scaling applied for object slot 0.

Fields.Name: Super Small (Obj 0)
Fields.Description: Momentum scaling for extremely small objects in slot 0.

Fields.Name: Small (Obj 0)
Fields.Description: Momentum scaling for small objects in slot 0.

Fields.Name: Normal (Obj 0)
Fields.Description: Momentum scaling for medium-sized objects in slot 0.

Fields.Name: Large (Obj 0)
Fields.Description: Momentum scaling for large objects in slot 0.

Fields.Name: Super Large (Obj 0)
Fields.Description: Momentum scaling for very large objects in slot 0.

Fields.Name: Hyper Large (Obj 0)
Fields.Description: Momentum scaling for extremely large objects in slot 0.

Fields.Name: Infinite (Obj 0)
Fields.Description: Momentum scaling treated as effectively infinite for slot 0.

Fields.Name: None (Obj 1)
Fields.Description: No momentum scaling applied for object slot 1.

Fields.Name: Super Small (Obj 1)
Fields.Description: Momentum scaling for extremely small objects in slot 1.

Fields.Name: Small (Obj 1)
Fields.Description: Momentum scaling for small objects in slot 1.

Fields.Name: Normal (Obj 1)
Fields.Description: Momentum scaling for medium-sized objects in slot 1.

Fields.Name: Large (Obj 1)
Fields.Description: Momentum scaling for large objects in slot 1.

Fields.Name: Super Large (Obj 1)
Fields.Description: Momentum scaling for very large objects in slot 1.

Fields.Name: Hyper Large (Obj 1)
Fields.Description: Momentum scaling for extremely large objects in slot 1.

Fields.Name: Infinite (Obj 1)
Fields.Description: Momentum scaling treated as effectively infinite for slot 1.
